content: For the time being do not compact folders, even if Thunderbird prompts you to do. There still might be an opportunity to recover your deleted messages: download and install the Thunderbird add-on "Undelete" from the authors' home page https://www.ggbs.de/extensions/Undelete.html Then proceed as I explained in this thread in the MozillaZine forum https://forums.mozillazine.org/viewtopic.php?p=15020650#p15020650
